Experienced in leadership and event management, with a focus on teamwork and innovation. Passionate about sustainable technologies and eager to apply technical and analytical skills to develop efficient energy solutions.

portfolio.title: Password-Based Irrigation System
portfolio.description: Designed and developed a secure irrigation system to prevent unauthorized water and electricity usage. Implemented password authentication and automated motor control using Embedded C. Integrated relay-based switching for efficient and controlled irrigation. Improved system security and operational efficiency

leadership.title: Club President
leadership.description: Created opportunities for freshers to explore entrepreneurship through workshops and startup events. Led teams and fostered collaboration to execute initiatives effectively. Coordinated with stakeholders and mentored students to build entrepreneurial and teamwork skills
